name: Chart Creator
description: Angular-based chart builder that allows users to upload Excel spreadsheets, select specific columns, choose from multiple chart types, and generate dynamic, interactive visualizations. The tool also supports easy export of charts to PDF for sharing, reporting, and presentation purposes.

name: To Do API
description: A RESTful task management API built with Java and Spring Boot, designed for efficient handling of tasks, subtasks, and status workflows. It follows clean architecture principles with a layered structure (Controller, Service, Repository) to ensure scalability, maintainability, and separation of concerns. The system supports full CRUD operations, relational data modeling, and is containerized with Docker for easy deployment.

name: Teacher Agenda
description: The Teacher Scheduling System is a comprehensive platform designed to streamline the management of teachers, shifts, classes, and academic schedules. It provides a structured, organized, and efficient way to control teaching workloads and avoid conflicts, ensuring a smooth academic management experience for institutions.

name: Online Menu
description: The Online Menu is a modern and interactive web application developed using React, designed to enhance the customer experience when ordering food. The platform allows users to browse menu items, customize their orders with extras, and submit the order seamlessly via WhatsApp.
